title: Wake of the Red Witch
writer: Harry Brown, Kenneth Gamet, Garland Roark
actors: John Wayne, Gail Russell, Gig Young
plot: During the 1860s in the South Pacific, Capt. Ralls, skipper of the Red Witch, has a series of adventures involving sunken gold bullion, pearls, natives, an unscrupulous ship owner and a giant octopus.
